text:
Several manga or novel series have been developed based on the various Evangelion series. While the first manga is a direct adaptation of the TV anime series, the following ones are the other manga and novels based on Evangelion.

Manga

Neon Genesis Evangelion (1995)
Neon Genesis Evangelion: Angelic Days (2003)
Neon Genesis Evangelion: Shinji Ikari Raising Project (manga) (2005)
It's A Miraculous Win (2006)
Evangelion Detective (manga) (2006)
Petit Eva (manga) (2007)
Neon Genesis Evangelion: Gakuen Datenroku (2007)
' (2007) by Tetsuo Yamashita and GB Planning
Petit Eva Bokura Tanken Dōkōkai (2009)
Neon Genesis Evangelion: The Shinji Ikari Detective Diary (2010)
Neon Genesis Evangelion: Legend of the Piko Piko Middle School Students (2014)
Evangelion: 3.0 (-120 min.) (2021)

Anthologies

Evangelion 4-Koma Complete Works (1996)
Enfant terrible (1996)
Neon Genesis Evangelion 4-Koma Neon Genesis (1996)
Evangelion - Anthology Comic EVA-C (1996)
Doujinshi Anthology Comic - FLY ME TO THE MOON (1996)
Neon Genesis Evangelion Comic Anthology (1996)
The Unit-01 is Currently Under Maintenance - Neon Genesis Evangelion Parody Works Anthology (1996)
Unit-02 is Currently Being Transferred - Neon Genesis Evangelion Parody Works Anthology (1996)
Warning Unit-03 is Running Out of Control - Neon Genesis Evangelion Parody Works Anthology (1996)
Top Secret Unit-04 Disappeared - Neon Genesis Evangelion Parody Works Anthology (1996)
Neon Genesis Evangelion Comic Anthology - TRAITOROUS ANGEL (1996)
Neon Genesis Evangelion Comic Anthology - TRAITOROUS ANGEL II (1996)
GOD'S IN HIS HEAVEN - Neon Genesis Evangelion Anthology Comic (1996)
Neon Genesis Evangelion Parody Competition Collection - Rei's Secret"' (1996)
Neon Genesis Evangelion Parody Anthology - Summer Children (1996)
Neon Genesis Evangelion Parody Competition Collection - Asuka Attacks!! (1997)
ALL'S RIGHT WITH THE WORLD - Neon Genesis Evangelion Anthology Comic (1997)
Neon Genesis Evangelion: Iron Maiden 4-Koma Gag Battle (1998)
Neon Genesis Evangelion: Iron Maiden Boy meets Girl (1998)
Neon Genesis Evangelion: Iron Maiden 4-Koma KINGS (1998)
Neon Genesis Evangelion: the Iron Maiden 2nd 4-Koma Manga Theater (2003)
Neon Genesis Evangelion: Ayanami Raising Project with Asuka Supplement Project 4Koma (2003)
Neon Genesis Evangelion: Eva & Eva 2 Anthology (2004)
Evangelion Anthology Best Reissue (2006)
Neon Genesis Evangelion: Comic Tribute (2010)
Tony Takezaki’s Neon Genesis Evangelion (2010)

Novels

Sore o Nasumono (1998)
Neon Genesis Evangelion: ANIMA (2008)
Transformers Mode "EVA" (2013)
